query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status, o.customerName, o.userId, o.stampsEarned, u.stamps as userStamps
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' AND o.stampsEarned > 0
ORDER BY o.orderNumber DESC
LIMIT 10;
